title: What is the description and main language of this repository…

messages_history.content: What is the description and main language of this repository?

The repository is named **'AI-Assist'** and is described as an **enterprise AI assistant with a Claude-code-like architecture, specialized in Java/WebSphere Liberty development**. The main language of the repository is **Python**, as indicated by the presence of files like **'main.py'** and **'requirements.txt'**.
